0.details:
writing to comfort my significant other after he lost his mother
show that I understand what he is going through
would like to be physically and emotionally there for support
remind him of the good times he had with his mother and how caring she was
say all the good things about his mother
0.model_generation: I’m so sorry for the loss you’re going through, and I wish I could take away even a fraction of your pain. I know how deeply you loved your mom and how much she loved you in return. I want you to lean on me—whether that means sitting together in silence, sharing memories over coffee, or holding each other close. Your mother was one of the kindest, most generous people I’ve ever known. She always had time to listen, a warm meal waiting at the table, and a hug that made everything feel better. I’ll never forget the afternoons she spent teaching you to ride your bike, her laughter filling the air as you two gardened side by side, and the way her eyes lit up whenever she saw you smile. Those moments remind me—and I hope they remind you—of the incredible love she brought into the world. I’m here for you today and every day, holding you in my heart.
0.final_version: I am very sorry and deeply saddened about what you are going through at this moment. I know it's not easy to accept. I would like to let you know that I am here for all the support you need; it might be just to talk, pray together, or just sit with you. I will be here. Please do not hesitate to ask me for anything. I am here to help with funeral arrangements, so feel free to call on me whenever you need something. Your mother was a very good woman, and everyone in this community is a witness to that. She was loved by everyone, the young and the old. She treated everyone with respect. She will always be in our hearts, and we will always cherish her and all the things she did for this community. You can keep her memory alive by remembering all the good things you did together. She will be greatly missed.

1.details:
friend from primary
how we never lost touch even after going to separate colleges
kept a tradition of meeting at least once a year, even just for coffee
being there for each other's big moments
being there when she met her to-be-husband
1.model_generation: I first met you on the playground in primary school—both of us pretending to be superheroes as if nothing could touch our imaginations. Since then, we’ve never lost touch, even when colleges took us miles apart. Every year, no matter how busy life became, we made time for our coffee tradition, swapping stories, laughter, and sometimes silent moments that said more than words. You stood by me through late-night study sessions and cheered me on at graduation, and I was honored to be by your side when you met your partner for the first time. Today, as you step into this new chapter, I celebrate the love you’ve found and the friendship we’ll carry forward. Here’s to the memories behind us and the adventures ahead. May your life together be filled with joy, laughter, and countless cups of coffee shared in the years to come.
1.final_version: This is a very emotional moment for me. I am so happy that I can't control the tears of joy. Today is my best friend's wedding, and I have never been happier in life. We have been friends since primary. I was a newcomer at our school, and I was so scared and confused. During breaktime she offered me some words of encouragement and offered to share her lunch with me. Unbeknown to the both of us, that was the beginning of our friendship. We have cried and laughed together so many times that we have lost count. We cried the most when it was time to go to college and we were accepted at different colleges. It felt like I was losing a part of me. We made a promise that no matter what happened, we were not going to lose each other. Not a week has gone by without talking. We made a promise that no matter how busy we are, we would at least have coffee once a year. Our lives have been so busy, but we kept that promise. I remember when you met your fiancé. We had a coffee date, and I was running late. I found you guys sitting together, and he joked that he was going to replace me. Little did we know that was the beginning of such a beautiful romantic story. I am very happy for you, my friend and I wish you al the happiness together.

2.details:
apology to close friend for not making our appointment
explain that an emergency came up at home
promise to buy them lunch to make up for it
explain how sorry I am
2.model_generation:
Hey,

I’m so sorry I missed our appointment yesterday. An unexpected emergency came up at home—a pipe burst in the basement and I had to stay until the plumber arrived and everything was under control. I know I should have let you know sooner, but things got hectic and I lost track of time. I feel awful for leaving you waiting and not keeping you updated.

You mean a lot to me, and I hate that I let you down. To make up for it, lunch is on me this week—let me know when you’re free and I’ll pick the place (or you choose!). I really appreciate your understanding and patience with me. I hope you can forgive the mix-up and we can spend some time together soon.

I’m deeply sorry and promise to be more reliable moving forward.

Take care,
Your friend
2.final_version:
Hey,

I’m so sorry I missed our appointment yesterday. An unexpected emergency came up at home—a pipe burst in the basement and I had to stay until the plumber arrived and everything was under control. I know I should have let you know sooner, but things got hectic and I lost track of time. I feel awful for leaving you waiting and not keeping you updated.

You mean a lot to me, and I hate that I let you down. To make up for it, lunch is on me this week—let me know when you’re free and I’ll pick the place (or you choose!). I really appreciate your understanding and patience with me. I hope you can forgive the mix-up, and we can spend some time together soon.

I’m deeply sorry and promise to be more reliable moving forward. Please accept my sincere apology.

Take care,
Your friend

3.details:
mention that it has been a very long time since we saw each other
express how much I have missed her and all the things we used to do together
tell her about a new job that I recently got
3.model_generation:
Hello there,

It’s been such a very long time since we last saw each other—far too long. I’ve missed you terribly and all the adventures we used to share: our weekend coffee chats, spontaneous road trips, and cozy movie nights. Your laughter and our late-night talks always brightened my days, and I find myself reminiscing about them often.

I wanted to share some exciting news: I recently started a new job as a marketing coordinator at a growing tech startup. It’s been an incredible experience so far—fast-paced, challenging, and rewarding—and I can’t wait to tell you more about it in person!

Lately I’ve also picked up hiking again and have been exploring local trails every chance I get. I treasure our friendship and hope we can reconnect soon. I’d love to hear what you’ve been up to. Let’s plan a time to catch up soon.

All my best,
3.final_version:
Hello there,

It’s been such a very long time since we last saw each other—far too long. I’ve missed you terribly and all the adventures we used to share: our weekend coffee chats, spontaneous road trips, and cosy movie nights. Your laughter and our late-night talks always brightened my days, and I find myself reminiscing about them often.

I wanted to share some exciting news: I recently started a new job as a marketing coordinator at a growing tech startup. It’s been an incredible experience so far—fast-paced, challenging, and rewarding—and I can’t wait to tell you more about it in person!

Lately I’ve also picked up hiking again and have been exploring local trails every chance I get. I treasure our friendship and hope we can reconnect soon. I’d love to hear what you’ve been up to. Let’s plan a time to catch up soon.

All my best,

4.details:
letter thanking my best friend for years
supported me when my mother was sick in hospital
made things very easy for me with running around and helping with errands when I couldn't
mention how much I appreciate her
4.model_generation:
Dear Emily,

I can’t find the words to express how grateful I am for your unwavering support over the years. You’ve been by my side through every high and low, but your kindness during my mother’s hospitalization meant the world to me. When I felt overwhelmed and unsure where to turn, you stepped in without hesitation. Whether it was picking up groceries, handling errands, or simply offering a shoulder to lean on, you made a difficult time feel more manageable. Your generosity and compassion lightened my load when I needed it most.

Your friendship is one of the most precious gifts in my life. I deeply appreciate your listening ear, your comforting presence, and your boundless patience. Thank you for standing strong with me, even when things got tough. I hope I can repay your kindness someday, though I doubt I could ever match your incredible heart.

With love and gratitude,
Jessica
4.final_version:

5.details:
writing a condolence letter to my cousin sister, who lost her mother
her mother was my mother's sister
how she practically raised me also since my mother worked long hours
how much she meant to me and how sorry I am for her loss
5.model_generation:
My dearest cousin,

I was heartbroken to learn of your mother’s passing. She was not only my aunt but the kindest, most generous person I have known. Growing up, she practically raised me when my own mother worked long hours, guiding me with patience, laughter, and unwavering support. Her presence will always be a cherished gift.

I know words cannot ease the pain you feel, but I hope you find comfort in the many beautiful memories you shared. Her gentle wisdom and warm spirit touched everyone around her and shaped our family in countless ways. Whenever I need strength or reassurance, I think of her courage and kindness.

Please remember that I am here for you—day or night—to listen, to talk, or simply to share silent moments together. Together, we will honor her memory and carry forward the legacy of love she left behind.

With all my love,  
Your loving cousin
5.final_version:
